optionsDescription: Generate one UUID v7 identifier or a local batch.
countDescription: Batch mode can generate 2 to 100 UUIDs at a time.
timestampModeDescription: Use the current clock value or pin the UUID v7 timestamp to a specific Unix millisecond.
timestampOutOfRange: Timestamp must be between {min} and {max} (Unix milliseconds).
resultsDescription: UUID v7 values are generated locally with a Unix millisecond timestamp and random bits.
resultsPlaceholder: Generated UUID v7 values will appear here…
